name: shadcn
description: shadcn/ui — die vollständige Bibliothek: alle ~60 Komponenten (Base-UI & Radix-UI-Variante, kompletter Quellcode, Props/Anatomy, alle Examples), 100+ Blocks, 70+ Charts, Theming/Colors/Tailwind-v4, Dark-Mode, Installation (Next/Vite/Astro/Remix/Laravel/TanStack/React-Router), CLI, components.json, eigene Registry bauen, MCP-Server, Forms, RTL, monorepo. Liefert den shadcn-MCP-Server mit.
